untranslatable_reason: W-shape pattern detection requires candlestick pattern recognition or local extrema analysis not available in the allowed indicator set. The pattern itself (two valleys with a peak between them) cannot be expressed using only price levels, moving averages, and oscillators. Volume trend conditions were also marked AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be operationalized.
translation_notes: Pattern structure approximated using pivot points as breakout reference. Entry uses pivot crossing to represent breakout direction (context-dependent: upward or downward). Exit targets 40% gain based on stated average_rise_pct and 42-day (6-week) hold window per exit conditions. Stop loss set conservatively at 5% given 5% failure rate. True pattern identification would require custom pattern scanner.
